allow: Bash(node web/scripts/parse-rider.mjs "RIDER ELSA Y ELMAR 2025 -FULL BAND - Venue Shows 030725.pdf")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./web/src/data/riderExtracted.json'\); const gt = d.sections.find\(s => s.type === 'ground_transport'\); console.log\('GROUND TRANSPORT pages:', gt?.pages\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\(gt?.freeText?.slice\(0, 3000\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./web/src/data/riderExtracted.json'\); const s = j.sections.find\(x=>x.tocIndex===6\); console.log\('---SEC6 free---'\); console.log\(s.freeText ? s.freeText.slice\(-400\) : 'no text'\); console.log\('---SEC2---'\); const s2 = j.sections.find\(x=>x.tocIndex===2\); console.log\(s2.title, '|', s2.pages, '|', s2.endPage\); console.log\(s2.freeText\); console.log\('---SEC3---'\); const s3 = j.sections.find\(x=>x.tocIndex===3\); console.log\(s3.title, '|', s3.pages, '|', s3.endPage\); console.log\(s3.freeText\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./web/src/data/riderExtracted.json'\); for \(const s of j.sections\) { console.log\('§'+s.tocIndex, '|', s.type, '|', s.title, '|', s.pages, '|end:', s.endPage, '| ftLen:', s.freeText? s.freeText.length : 0\); }")
